title: Slovakian Cod Fritters
description: Crispy, flavorful fritters made with cod and traditional Slovakian spices. Perfect as an appetizer or snack.

ingredients.name: Peppery breadcrumbs
ingredients.notes: Panko or regular breadcrumbs with dried pepper

ingredients.name: Slovakian stir-fry mix
ingredients.notes: Available at most specialty stores or online

ingredients.name: Fry oil
ingredients.notes: Vegetable or canola oil for frying

instructions: In a bowl, mix together cod, peppery breadcrumbs, flour, eggs, and Slovakian stir-fry mix.
Heat about 1/2 inch of fry oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Using a spoon, drop small amounts of the cod mixture into the hot oil, flattening slightly.
Fry for about 3-4 minutes or until golden brown and crispy. Flip and fry for another 2-3 minutes.
Remove the fritters from the oil with a slotted spoon and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve immediately with your favorite dipping sauce.
